appraisal_events.evidence: « il sera beaucoup pardonné à Bergotte puisqu'il a trouvé mon petit enfant gentil »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator’s mother grants explicit indulgence to Bergotte because he judged the child amiable; it is a local elevation of his value in her eyes.

status_effects.explanation: He locally gains esteem with the narrator’s mother thanks to his compliment about the child.
